title: McCarthy Tétrault MOVES
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault MOVES
Forward-thinking insights and commentary on Canadian transportation and logistics law issues
This blog covers a broad range of issues relating to Canada’s transportation and shipping industries. Featuring insights from McCarthy Tétrault’s industry-leading Transportation and Logistics Group, it explores topics ranging from rail, road, air and marine transport, warehousing, highway safety codes, ride-sharing, motor carrier regulations, supply chain, and more. This blog is designed as a comprehensive source of news and expert commentary for those navigating Canada’s evolving transportation laws, helping businesses make informed decisions regarding shipping and transport.
All form fields are required " * "
